summary: No network surface to preview. Both edits are local-only backend robustness fixes with zero network involvement. safeReaddir's only I/O is the pre-existing local readdir (fs/promises); the change merely broadens the swallowed error code from ENOENT to ENOENT||ENOTDIR. buildEvidenceItem is pure in-memory object-literal construction. Grep over added lines for require/import/fetch/http/net/dns/child_process returned no matches. No new I/O, no runtime/environment assumptions, nothing deployable or previewable in a network sense.

inspection.summary: Read the complete diff of both files vs origin/main and grep-checked all added lines for any network/socket/DNS/HTTP-client/child-process introduction. Confirmed the runtime surface is unchanged Node.js (fs/promises readdir + object literals); no ports, no endpoints.

judgment_delta: Initial expectation (backend, local-only, likely no network). Final pass: diff and import-grep confirm zero network calls, no I/O beyond existing local readdir, no runtime/environment assumptions — nothing network to preview.
